EXW3 KERNEL LICENSE AGREEMENT

Copyright (c) 2026 EXW3 Project

TERMS AND CONDITIONS

1. GRANT OF LICENSE
   This license grants you the right to use the EXW3 kernel (exw3-kernel.js) 
   in your personal or commercial projects.

2. PERMITTED USES
   You may:
   - Use the kernel in unlimited projects
   - Create and distribute mods using the .ex3 format
   - Modify the mod-config.json configuration file
   - Distribute applications built with this kernel

3. RESTRICTIONS
   You may NOT:
   - Edit, modify, or attempt to modify the kernel file (exw3-kernel.js)
   - Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the kernel
   - Remove or alter any copyright notices from the kernel
   - Redistribute the kernel separately from a complete application
   - Create derivative works based on the kernel source code
   - Attempt to extract, view, or access the kernel source code
   - Use automated tools to modify or transform the kernel file

4. KERNEL INTEGRITY
   The kernel file (exw3-kernel.js) must remain unmodified. Any attempt to:
   - Edit the file contents
   - Modify the file structure
   - Alter the file in any way
   - Circumvent protection mechanisms
   
   Will result in immediate termination of this license.

5. MOD SYSTEM
   All customization and extension of functionality must be done through:
   - The official mod system (.ex3 files)
   - The configuration file (mod-config.json)
   - The documented public API

6. DISTRIBUTION
   When distributing applications built with this kernel:
   - Include this license file
   - Keep the kernel file unmodified
   - Clearly indicate which parts are your mods
   - Do not claim ownership of the kernel

7. WARRANTY DISCLAIMER
   THE KERNEL IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
   IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
   FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT.

8. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
   IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM,
   DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR
   OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE KERNEL OR THE
   USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE KERNEL.

9. TERMINATION
   This license automatically terminates if you violate any of these terms.
   Upon termination, you must cease all use of the kernel and destroy all copies.

10. GOVERNING LAW
    This license shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws
    of your jurisdiction.

BY USING THE EXW3 KERNEL, YOU AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THE TERMS OF THIS LICENSE.

For questions or licensing inquiries, contact: [your-email@example.com]
